questionHtml: Outline how mutation can lead to cancer.
markschemeHtml:
1.  mutations are random changes in the sequences of genes/DNA;
  2.  (mutation) may involve addition/deletion/substitution/inversion of DNA bases;
  3.  (mutations) in tumour suppressor genes/oncogenes;
  4.  uncontrolled cell division/mitosis occurs;
  5.  abnormal cells cannot perform their function;
  6.  they divide repeatedly to form tumours;

meta.title: Outline how mutation can lead to cancer.
breadcrumbLabels: D1.3.6. Consequences of mutation in germ cells and somatic cells
